groups.name: app.media
groups.description: Media file upload and serving settings.

groups.name: ai
groups.description: AI assistant (Spark) model and rate-limiting settings.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64URL-encoded secret key for JWT signing. In production, set via JWT_SECRET environment variable.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token validity in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.ratelimit.enabled
properties.description: Whether the in-memory HTTP rate limiter is active.

properties.name: app.ratelimit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: Max requests per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Override with APP_CORS_ORIGINS env var in production.

properties.name: app.media.upload-dir
properties.description: Filesystem directory where uploaded media files are stored.

properties.name: app.media.base-url
properties.description: Base URL prefix for serving stored media files.

properties.name: ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the Ollama REST API.

properties.name: ai.model
properties.description: Ollama model name to use for the Spark AI assistant.

properties.name: ai.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum tokens the model may generate per response.

properties.name: ai.ratelimit.requests-per-hour
properties.description: Max AI chat requests allowed per user per hour.

properties.name: ai.ratelimit.max-concurrent
properties.description: Max concurrent AI streaming responses across all users.

properties.name: ai.system-prompt
properties.description: Override the default Spark AI system prompt. Useful for testing or staging environments.

properties.name: spring.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Flyway database migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.locations
properties.description: Locations of migration scripts (e.g. classpath:db/migration).

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to baseline an existing schema on first Flyway run.

properties.name: spring.flyway.validate-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to validate applied migrations against available scripts during migration.

properties.name: spring.flyway.out-of-order
properties.description: Whether out-of-order migrations are allowed (useful for branching workflows).

properties.name: spring.flyway.repair-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically repair the Flyway schema history table before each migration run.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the H2 web console (dev-only — never enable in production).
